profile.source: context/PROJECT_STATUS.json, startup brief, game skill profile, and live code; unmatched arc-profile registry fallback rejected

gameLoopReview.evidence: No context/GAME_LOOP.md or recent docs/PLAYTESTS files and context/SOUL.md is public-safe only; scores are provisional and derive from live runtime/browser contracts rather than fabricated player observations.

items.title: Make every marquee GM decision execute or create a measurable obligation
items.premise: The decision modal promises player, pick, cap, and organizational consequences, but applyGmDecisionConsequence currently records momentum/risk metadata, news, and transaction prose without executing the named roster/cap move or creating an expiring mandate that later resolves.

L1.recipe: Classify every option as immediate or commitment and emit a source-derived receipt.

L2.recipe: Execute safe immediate consequences through existing runtime primitives; persist measurable expiring commitments; resolve success/failure into owner heat, fan sentiment, morale, legacy, news, and history.

L3.recipe: Add multi-week negotiation branches and cross-season promise reputation.

items.executionEvidence: Immediate depth-chart and cap actions, directionally honest trade obligations, expiring success/failure receipts, owner/fan/morale/legacy effects, news/history, and browser commitment visibility shipped; combined consequence/checkpoint verification passed 10/10.

items.title: Preserve consequential decisions and ceremonies inside accelerated simulation
items.premise: The deliberate one-week path asks for tactics and a GM decision and then ingests inbox, moments, and review beats; the four-week and season loops repeatedly post bare advances and refresh only at the end, allowing deadlines, crises, controlled playoff games, and season-review crossings to be skipped.

L1.recipe: Stop accelerated sim on phase changes and active GM decisions.

L2.recipe: Introduce a shared checkpoint classifier, accumulate a source-derived digest, pause only for material controlled-team moments, and resume with one action.

L3.recipe: Add configurable checkpoint sensitivity and autoplay policies.

items.executionEvidence: Source-derived phase, playoff, decision, and commitment checkpoints now pause accelerated loops; a visible five-step digest retains franchise results and one action resolves/resumes remaining work; runtime decision-contract and browser wiring verification passed.

items.title: Turn the Priority Inbox into a reconstructable franchise journal
items.premise: Inbox items and de-duplication live in browser module memory while a single global localStorage timestamp marks reads. Reloads erase items, and different saves share read state even though the underlying news/event source persists.

L1.recipe: Scope read cursors to a stable franchise identity and persist item snapshots.

L2.recipe: Reconstruct from stable event IDs, merge persisted state idempotently, retain critical items until their linked action/outcome resolves, and surface unread truth per save.

L3.recipe: Add a searchable multi-season journal with resolution receipts.

items.executionEvidence: Stable franchiseId added to dashboard; inbox cache/read/resolution state is scoped and reconstructable; 41/41 focused inbox/browser/runtime tests passed.

items.title: Convert the weekly tactic prompt into opponent-aware strategy with a postgame receipt
items.premise: Weekly tactics mechanically alter the simulation and are restored after the game, but the modal always offers the same context-free labels and the user receives no source-derived explanation of matchup fit or whether the chosen plan produced the intended observable result.

L1.recipe: Annotate options with opponent tendency and explicit tradeoff.

L2.recipe: Build a deterministic matchup brief from opponent roster/scheme/injuries and a postgame film receipt from actual box-score/play telemetry, with no causal claims beyond observed deltas.

L3.recipe: Add multi-week tendency learning and counter-adjustment memory.

items.executionEvidence: Opponent-aware modal and persistent source-derived Film Receipt shipped; syntax checks and 21/21 focused tactic/browser/runtime tests passed.

items.title: Make every founder-facing startup signal source-derived and self-validating
items.premise: The live startup brief renders unknown rolling averages/closeout age/genome and malformed truncated rows despite available project state, labels flat-rate plan ledger estimates as real spend, and allows an unmatched registry fallback to misprofile this public game as internal infrastructure.

L1.recipe: Fix current parsers and flat-rate wording.

L2.recipe: Introduce explicit source/fallback contracts, invariant validation, width-safe rows, and tests for modern SIL/status formats and flat-rate Max Plan cost semantics.

L3.recipe: Emit machine-readable signal provenance and drift diagnostics for every brief field.

verification: truth fixture with current status/SIL formats
items.executionEvidence: Modern SIL average/date parsing, manifest profile fallback, status compliance, prelaunch revenue N/A, cache Genius List, width-safe rows, and flat-rate notional cost semantics shipped; validator green and protocol smoke 19/19.

items.title: Make the documented JSON-to-audit renderer executable in this repo
items.premise: The canonical audit skill requires scripts/render-audit-md.mjs, but the command fails with MODULE_NOT_FOUND, forcing manual Markdown duplication and weakening the JSON sole-source contract.

L1.recipe: Render the latest session JSON into the canonical Markdown table.

L2.recipe: Add deterministic source selection, schema validation, merge-safe output, premise/skip/game-loop sections, and focused tests.

L3.recipe: Add audit brief rendering and structural diff diagnostics.

items.executionEvidence: Deterministic JSON-to-Markdown renderer added; 3/3 focused tests and syntax check passed; Session 47 sidecar round-trip is current.

preverifiedSkips.reason: Rejected: desktop and mobile fan sentiment surfaces already exist; the real gap is action memory and consequence authority.
Rejected: four choices already modify weeklyPlan for the real simulation; the real gap is matchup intelligence and an honest result receipt.
Rejected: deterministic follow-up quotes already remember prior podium tone; the higher-value gap is user-authored commitment and source-derived tactic language.
Deferred honestly: real on-domain email forwarding receipt and current live-origin proof remain external evidence gates and cannot be fabricated.
